metaDescription: Joon Development Group is an owner-operated Southern California general contractor for residential remodels, ADUs, additions, outdoor living, and property improvements.
pageTitle: Joon Development Group | Southern California General Contractor

hero.headline: Built for the way Southern California lives and works.
hero.subhead: Joon Development Group helps homeowners and property owners move from idea to finished space with disciplined estimating, hands-on project management, and a builder's respect for long-term value.

services.heading: Renovation, construction, and owner-minded execution.
services.intro: Our work centers on residential remodels, additions, ADUs, new construction support, outdoor living, and practical property upgrades across Southern California.
services.note: Visuals on this page are representative or conceptual service imagery while Joon's public project photography library is being built; they are not presented as completed Joon projects.

cards.title: Kitchen and Bathroom Remodels
cards.blurb: Layout planning, finish coordination, tile, cabinetry, fixtures, lighting, and trade scheduling for high-use rooms that need to work beautifully every day.
cards.alt: Modern kitchen remodel with wood cabinetry and stone countertops

cards.title: Full Home Renovations
cards.blurb: Whole-home remodels, open floor plans, flooring, doors, paint, trim, exterior refreshes, and coordinated project delivery from demo through final walk-through.
cards.alt: Contemporary Southern California home exterior after renovation

cards.title: ADUs and Room Additions
cards.blurb: Garage conversions, detached units, bedroom additions, and permitted square footage expansions managed through planning, trades, inspections, and closeout.
cards.alt: Detached guest house and backyard living area

cards.title: New Construction Support
cards.blurb: Residential ground-up projects, major additions, framing, trade coordination, and inspection-ready closeout with a practical owner's eye.
cards.alt: Residential addition and exterior remodel under construction

cards.title: Interior Finish Work
cards.blurb: Flooring, paint, drywall, millwork, doors, hardware, lighting, and final punch-list management for homes and residential investment properties.
cards.alt: Finished bedroom remodel with warm natural light

cards.title: Exterior and Site Upgrades
cards.blurb: Facade improvements, roofing coordination, concrete, patios, drainage, hardscape, exterior paint, and practical upgrades that protect property value.
cards.alt: Outdoor patio and hardscape renovation with seating area

about.heading: Led by Frank Nozar.
about.founderTitle: Principal / California Class B General Contractor
about.founderImageAlt: Frank Nozar, principal of Joon Development Group
about.propertyImageAlt: Representative Southern California residential property exterior
paragraphs: Frank Nozar has been investing in and developing real estate in Los Angeles since 2013 and brings that owner's perspective to residential construction.

Joon Development Group is built around clear communication, practical budgeting, and durable work. The goal is simple: help homeowners improve the spaces they live in without losing control of the scope, schedule, or finish quality.
The team focuses on residential remodels, additions, ADUs, outdoor living, and property upgrades throughout Southern California.
about.credentialLabel: Investing in and developing Los Angeles real estate

focus.heading: Homes, additions, ADUs, and outdoor spaces.
focus.intro: Joon Development Group is built for homeowners who care about both the finished look and the durability, budget, schedule, and resale implications behind the walls. The images below are representative categories, not completed-project claims. As new client projects are photographed, this section should become a true portfolio with locations, scopes, and before-and-after proof.

cards.title: Luxury Remodels
cards.blurb: Kitchen, bath, living space, and whole-home renovations with careful finish coordination.
cards.alt: Luxury bathroom remodel with stone and glass shower

cards.title: Outdoor Living
cards.blurb: Patios, hardscape, pool-adjacent upgrades, exterior paint, and curb appeal improvements.
cards.alt: Backyard pool and outdoor living renovation

cards.title: ADUs and Additions
cards.blurb: Detached units, garage conversions, bedrooms, family rooms, and added square footage planned around real daily use.
cards.alt: Detached guest house and residential addition

cards.title: Capital Repairs
cards.blurb: Roofing, concrete, ADA upgrades, preventive maintenance, and value-add property work.
cards.alt: Contractor and construction worker reviewing plans

process.heading: Clear scope. Clean communication. No mystery handoffs.
process.intro: You work directly with an owner-led team that understands permits, trades, homeowner needs, change orders, and the cost of slow decisions.

steps.title: We understand the goal.
steps.blurb: We review the property, constraints, budget range, timeline, and the reason the project matters.

steps.title: We price the real work.
steps.blurb: We define materials, trades, permitting needs, unknowns, and assumptions before the job starts.

steps.title: We coordinate the moving parts.
steps.blurb: Subcontractors, inspections, schedule, field decisions, and change control stay organized.

steps.title: We finish with accountability.
steps.blurb: Punch list, documentation, final walkthrough, and follow-up are handled with ownership.

faq.heading: Answers homeowners and property owners usually need first.
faq.intro: Strong local contractor sites reduce uncertainty before the first call. These answers set expectations around scope, permits, communication, and project fit.

items.q: Do you handle permits and inspections?
items.a: Yes. When a project requires permits, Joon coordinates the permit path, required trades, inspections, and closeout steps so the work is documented properly.
Joon is based in Los Angeles and focuses on Southern California, including the San Fernando Valley, Ventura, and nearby Los Angeles County communities.

items.q: Can you work with existing plans?
items.a: Yes. Joon can review existing drawings, coordinate with architects or engineers, and help turn plans into a realistic scope, budget, and construction sequence.

items.q: What makes Joon different from a typical remodeler?
items.a: Frank's commercial real estate background gives each project an owner's lens: budget discipline, schedule, family impact, and long-term property value.

contact.heading: Tell us what you want to build, improve, or repair.
contact.intro: Send the basics and we will follow up to understand the site, scope, timing, and next step. Southern California residential projects are the core focus.
projectTypes: Exterior, concrete, roofing, or repair work
